headline: A Look At Microchip Technology (MCHP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Microchip Technology stock at a glance Microchip Technology (MCHP) has seen mixed recent share performance, with a 1 day return of 2.1% decline, a 7 day return of 7.4% decline, and a month return of 10.5% decline. Over longer periods, the stock shows a past 3 months return of 8.0% and a 1 year total return of 20.7%, while the 3 year total return stands at 10.9% decline and the 5 year total return at 9.8%.
